subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur hath borne witness before all things that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower. He hath revealed the verses and manifested the clear proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد لسان العظمه قبل الاشیآء انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب قد انزل الآیات و اظهر البینات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God and human limitations, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
